input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8771 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The reported javac failure is an API drift issue in generated tests: maven-artifact 2.0.7 ArtifactResolutionException and ArtifactNotFoundException constructors include an additional String/classifier-style argument compared with the generated calls. This should be fixed in test code, not by setup.

Full Maven build execution can touch user.dir, user.home, local repository, settings, and remote repositories; generated tests should prefer isolated unit-style coverage and temporary directories rather than invoking real dependency resolution or networked builds.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No concrete extra setup is needed: maven-core 2.0.7 resolves its Maven/Plexus/Wagon runtime dependencies transitively, and meaningful coverage can exercise CLI/version, runtime information, diagnosers, lifecycle/plugin classes, and model/project APIs without Docker, an added Maven dependency, or required environment/system properties.
